THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT HOFFMAN, SARAH DOROTHY TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT WAN, YUNG TAI YUNG TAI WAN FAILED TO CARRY BURDEN OF PROOF. CROSS-CLAIM JUDGMENT IS OFFERED IN FAVOR OF YUNG TAI WAN AND AGAINST SARAH DOROTHY HOFFMAN IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00. SARAH DOROTHY HOFFMAN FAILED TO CARRY BURDEN OF PROOF. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF AUG-23-2013. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. APPELLANT, YUNG TAI WAN APPEARS WITH ATTORNEY GEORGE S. WYNNS (#287373) AND WITNESS, OFFICER BRYAN COTTER/SFPD. RESPONDENT, SARAH DOROTHY HOFFMAN APPEARS WITH ATTORNEY, NICOLE BUSSI (#252763). JUDGE GRANTS 10 MINUTE RECESS FOR COUNSEL, GEORGE S. WYNNS, TO APPEAR AT EX PARTE HEARING IN DEPARTMENT 302. COURT RESUMES AFTER BRIEF RECESS. PARTIES PREVIOUSLY SWORN, TESTIFY IN THE NARRATIVE AND RESPOND TO QUESTIONS FROM JUDGE FLEMING.
